plugins.name: forgebee
plugins.description: Batteries-included development and growth framework — 33 slash commands, 69 specialist agents (including 12 review sub-agents), 26 lifecycle hooks across 9 events, 3 skills, mode-aware permission system (auto/bypass/default), adversarial debate system with batched debates, continuous learning with heuristic pattern detection and pending-instinct approval, command-to-agent delegation, manifest-driven sync tooling, JSON handoff contracts, anti-rationalization gates, crash recovery checkpointing, governance audit trail, Growth OS 9-phase marketing pipeline, evidence-based verification, TDD enforcement, and automated project management. Compatible with Claude Code and OpenClaw.
